TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Taitung, title = Taitung, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Taitung} }

S.FORM: Taitung kakilimaan Taitung a sakuwan ku Taitung. kumud nu kalesakan, 111.48 km¬≤. (kalesakan nu linpanti 0.47 km¬≤, kalesakan nu pawliwti 1.09 km¬≤), u kasabinawlan, 10,692 ku tademaw. u kasalumaluma' sa, 3,655 ku luma'. ilabu nu kasaniyazu' nu siyang sa, 6,817 ku yingcumin a tademaw. u kasabinawlan , Pakalatu 64%(Pangcah, Puyuma, Paiwan) ku kasabinawlan. u Pangcah atu Puyuma atu Paiwan ku sakalaniyazu'. nikasakuwakuwan a niyazu' Taitung mala 46 a cuwen atu 20 ku niyazu'. kina 20 a niyazu'sa, Apapuro niyazu' , Pasawali niyazu' , Ining niyazu' , Falangaw niyazu' , Asiroay niyazu' , Pusong niyazu' , Alapanay niyazu' , Karoroan niyazu' , Matang niyazu' , Katatipul niyazu' , Kasavakan niyazu' , Puyuma niyazu' , Papulu niyazu' , Kalaluran niyazu' , Fukid niyazu' , Pongodan niyazu' , Sihodingan niyazu' , Kakawasan niyazu' , Siafulungay niyazu' , Pakurung niyazu' . ŤáļśĚĪŚłā pusung se ( :PusungÔľõŚćĎŚćóŤ™ě:PusungÔľõŚłÉŤĺ≤Ť™ě:PusungÔľõŤáļÁĀ£Ť©Ī:T√Ęi-tang-chhńęÔľõŤáļÁĀ£ŚģĘŚģ∂Ť™ěŚõõÁł£ŤÖĒ:toiňá dungňä sii), . ( u misulitay tu sasulitan u pusung se; nu pancah; pusung; nu piwma;pusung; nu punung;pusung; nu layak a kamu;Tai-tang-chhi; nu Taywan a ngayngay sepad ku ngihah; toi dung' sii ), u nu pusung a kenis u satabakiay a mikuwanay nu tu-se, kitidaan i pusungan a kenis nu sawalian miduduc tu bayu i payteban, i sawalian u taypinyang, satimulan micapi tu tay-ma-li kenis, nu satipan atu saamisan micapi tu piwma a kenis. u ahebal nu lala' idaw ku cacay a lasubu idaw ku cacay a bataan nu pin-huwan-kung-li, malu satabakiay ahebal nu lala' u masacacaycacay sanay u sacacay sanay malakuwid ku cac pin-huwan-kung-li nu pikuwan a kenis; u tademaw makaala tu 10,5 a mang, nu ki-lan kalinku pusung a kenis nu tademawan sa u satabakiay nu paycacay a tuse, hamin nu kenis sa idaw ku pankiway a tademaw u enen i tini manin pangangan i tuse . šĺÜśļź: ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ laylay u enal nu pusung yu mahida naayaway u nu yincumin u piuma a binacadan, nu amis a binacadan u kakitidaan a muenen, hanipidang han maluk ku nikaudip hawsa. naw u he-lan atu kahulaman i ayaw atu nu dikudan u nu dumaan a malcacad nu kakitidaan sa pangangan han tu ''piwma'', nataway sa idaw tu ku layak a tademaw malingatu tu nikalalacadan nu misiwbayay. u he-lan a tademaw nanu tawya tu maydih i tini a papikudkud tu kim sisa patayni tu hitay misadabek, atu piwma a binacadan u li-ciya niyadu', tay-an niyadu' namangangayaw tu, aydaay u pusung a kenis ya masa cacayay a lunem a salisinan ilabu nu tatangahan u sin-wan mamin idaw hen ku naayayaw a ukak nu hitay. . i naayaw a miheca u kasu mamadana henay, sini patideng tu piwma a pikawawan, i nadikudan u Taywan ya masatapangay ci Liu-min-cuwan micuduh a misumad, pangangan han tu pusung a kenis nu tuse. i nu ayawan nu lipun sa, sumad han tu ku ngangan'' sadimulan a kenis baluhay a tuse''. nu kahulaman a nipikuwanan sa mipela tu pabeli tu Taywan atu lipun hawsa, pangangan hantu tu ''piwma kenis'', nu pusung a pikawawan i satimulan a kenis. ŚúįÁźÜÁíįŚĘÉ liwliw nu kakitidaan pusung a kenis i sawali nu satimul nu Taywan, u misudikuday tu buyu' misuayaway tu bayu u masatanayuay ku lala' nu wayway a tuse, kakitidaan nu yakuba i cin-wwiy-tu i tung-cin 121,10 tu, pi-uy 22,45 tu. i satipan u cung-yang-san-may nu malalikeluhay buyu' ienal tukus nudadan atu matatepal tu piwma a kenis, satipan nu timul mitepal tu ce-pe a sawac atu tay-ma-li a kenis masasuayaw, i saamisan sa u tukus a buyu' u lumeniay a bukes a sawac atupiwma a kenis ku tatudung, sawali sa u waliyu, hamin nu lala' a kitidaan u tukus a buyu' nu katimulan, i sawali u cung-yang-san-may, satimul nu saamis katanayu'19,8 kungli, . u kakaydaan nu nanum a sawac namakayda i saamisan katukuh i satimulan idaw ku piwma a sawac, tay-pin a sawac, li-ciya a sawac, ce-pen a sawac, makakilul musilsil tayda i waliyu, ya wayway nu silsil mahida u sapihpih a kukus i pusung, u satalakaway a talakaw pitu a bataan idaw ku lima a ditek i li-i- a buyu', taneng micekaw tu a adihan ku pusung. u pusung a kenis i masatukusay a pusung, u nikahida nu masasetulay a piwma a sawac, i kasinawan nu makatimulay a wali amis u puu' nu bali mautiih nu cung-yang-san-may atu tukus nu buyu' mapapuud , nika u pusung i Taywan nu sawali satimul a tukusan, u demiat u dihkuay a nikasasumad nu bali i bayu, kyu i kasienawan mahidatu ku dihku, sisa u pusung a kenis u masacaledesay a masapuu'ay a demiad nu bali. ÁĒĘś•≠ nilaculan kina tebanay a sasuwbayan a kenis sa i nu ayawan nu kinsihu i cung-cen a dadan atu cung-san a dadan, ya malumanay a silamalay i nu ayawan sa u sin-sena a dadan atu nu idaway tu a dadan tu tay 11 a dadanan ku caculilan i tida cung-huw a dadan, kyu ya malumanay a silamalay nu pusung matenes pinaay tu kakiya caay sakapahi nai' ku pacakayay a misiwbay i tuse, namahida saca u sihu misakapah a misanga tu aidangan nu pikawawan atu dadan nu kisiya a pidangan, 2015 a mihca ya pikawawan a idanga sa misumad aca tu palu basu u mitupinan a pikawawan atu i naayaway a pabasuan tu kakacawan i pusung malu nu piadihan tu kacudu , kyu mala tuluay a salacul tu sakasikalisiw kancaay aca caay kahamin malawpes. sikaidaw ku nikapulunga a mitupinan kyu sidadan tu sakaudip atu hami mapulung nikalahecian, misabaluhay aca tu yadahay a misiwbaay atu u pahanhanan nu pidangan atu mahicahicaay a itida nisiwbay tu malalitinay a patiyan micumud tu i dadan nu kisiya atu sin-sen a dadan, kya sasiwbayan i capi nu baluhay a silamalay nai' ku muculilay caay kakapah ku siwbay, u kakabian a pahanhanan atu pacaliway tu utubay malu tuluay tu a sasikalisiw a kawaw, u kahenulan a tuud nu malukay sa idaw ku belac, cikiya, lu-sen a balu', iyu-cay a balu', sungsuli, mami, kamacal, usal. sungsuli, mami, kamacal, usal. u pibuting tu a salacul i pusung a kenis inatu nu hu-kang i kalalikeluhan nu kelah, yadah ku babutingan, sika idaw ku ngangan nu babiutingan idaw ku u piya' nu bayu, nu likenay a kabus, man-pu a buting, maninelay a buting, u lita, masakawsuwaay a buting, u salengacay a tatelecan a buting, masabaluay a sizimi, u ci-ciw mahbin. lahud
S.PHON: taituŇč kakir~…ĺimaan taituŇč a sakuwan ku taituŇč. kumud nu kar~…ĺ…ôsakan, ***.** km*. (kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu r~…ĺinpanti *.** km*, kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu pawr~…ĺiwti *.** km*), u kasabinawr~…ĺan, **,*** ku tad…ômaw. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sa, *,*** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. ir~…ĺabu nu kasanijazu Ē~ ° nu sijaŇč sa, *,*** ku jiŇč ¶umin a tad…ômaw. u kasabinawr~…ĺan , pakar~…ĺatu **%(paŇč ¶ańß, pujuma, paiwan) ku kasabinawr~…ĺan. u paŇč ¶ańß atu pujuma atu paiwan ku sakar~…ĺanijazu Ē~ °. nikasakuwakuwan a nijazu Ē~ ° taituŇč mar~…ĺa ** a ¶uw…ôn atu ** ku nijazu Ē~ °. kina ** a nijazu Ē~ °sa, apapuro nijazu Ē~ ° , pasawar~…ĺi nijazu Ē~ ° , iniŇč nijazu Ē~ ° , far~…ĺaŇčaw nijazu Ē~ ° , asiroaj nijazu Ē~ ° , pusoŇč nijazu Ē~ ° , ar~…ĺapanaj nijazu Ē~ ° , karoroan nijazu Ē~ ° , mataŇč nijazu Ē~ ° , katatipur~…ĺ nijazu Ē~ ° , kasa*akan nijazu Ē~ ° , pujuma nijazu Ē~ ° , papur~…ĺu nijazu Ē~ ° , kar~…ĺar~…ĺuran nijazu Ē~ ° , fukid nijazu Ē~ ° , poŇčodan nijazu Ē~ ° , sińßodiŇčan nijazu Ē~ ° , kakawasan nijazu Ē~ ° , siafur~…ĺuŇčaj nijazu Ē~ ° , pakuruŇč nijazu Ē~ ° . *** pusuŇč s…ô ( :pusuŇč****:pusuŇč****:pusuŇč****:t*i-taŇč- ¶ńßńß**********:toi* duŇč* sii), . ( u misur~…ĺitaj tu sasur~…ĺitan u pusuŇč s…ô; nu pan ¶ańß; pusuŇč; nu piwma;pusuŇč; nu punuŇč;pusuŇč; nu r~…ĺajak a kamu;tai-taŇč- ¶ńßńßi; nu tajwan a ŇčajŇčaj s…ôpad ku Ňčińßańß; toi duŇč Ē~ ° sii ), u nu pusuŇč a k…ônis u satabakiaj a mikuwanaj nu tu-s…ô, kitidaan i pusuŇčan a k…ônis nu sawar~…ĺian midudu ¶ tu baju i pajt…ôban, i sawar~…ĺian u tajpinjaŇč, satimur~…ĺan mi ¶api tu taj-ma-r~…ĺi k…ônis, nu satipan atu saamisan mi ¶api tu piwma a k…ônis. u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° idaw ku ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubu idaw ku ¶a ¶aj a bataan nu pin-ńßuwan-kuŇč-r~…ĺi, mar~…ĺu satabakiaj ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° u masa ¶a ¶aj ¶a ¶aj sanaj u sa ¶a ¶aj sanaj mar~…ĺakuwid ku ¶a ¶ pin-ńßuwan-kuŇč-r~…ĺi nu pikuwan a k…ônis; u tad…ômaw makaar~…ĺa tu **,* a maŇč, nu ki-r~…ĺan kar~…ĺinku pusuŇč a k…ônis nu tad…ômawan sa u satabakiaj nu paj ¶a ¶aj a tus…ô, ńßamin nu k…ônis sa idaw ku pankiwaj a tad…ômaw u …ôn…ôn i tini manin paŇčaŇčan i tus…ô . **: ** r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj u …ônar~…ĺ nu pusuŇč ju mańßida naajawaj u nu jin ¶umin u piuma a bina ¶adan, nu amis a bina ¶adan u kakitidaan a mu…ôn…ôn, ńßanipidaŇč ńßan mar~…ĺuk ku nikaudip ńßawsa. naw u ńß…ô-r~…ĺan atu kańßur~…ĺaman i ajaw atu nu dikudan u nu dumaan a mar~…ĺ ¶a ¶ad nu kakitidaan sa paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu Ē~ ° Ē~ °piwma Ē~ ° Ē~ °, natawaj sa idaw tu ku r~…ĺajak a tad…ômaw mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu nikar~…ĺar~…ĺa ¶adan nu misiwbajaj. u u pusuŇč a k…ônis ja masa ¶a ¶ajaj a r~…ĺun…ôm a sar~…ĺisinan ir~…ĺabu nu tataŇčańßan u sin-wan mamin idaw ńß…ôn ku naajajaw a ukak nu ńßitaj. . i naajaw a mińß…ô ¶a u kasu mamadana ńß…ônaj, sini ŇčaŇčan Ē~ ° Ē~ ° sadimur~…ĺan a k…ônis bar~…ĺuńßaj a tus…ô Ē~ ° Ē~ °. nu kańßur~…ĺaman a nipikuwanan sa mip…ôr~…ĺa tu pab…ôr~…ĺi tu tajwan atu r~…ĺipun ńßawsa, paŇčaŇčan ńßantu tu Ē~ ° Ē~ °piwma masatanajuaj ku r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° nu wajwaj a tus…ô, kakitidaan nu jakuba i ¶in-wwij-tu i tuŇč- ¶in ***,** tu, pi-uj **,** tu. i satipan u ¶uŇč-jaŇč-san-maj nu mar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńßaj buju Ē~ ° i…ônar~…ĺ tukus nudadan atu matat…ôpar~…ĺ tu piwma a k…ônis, satipan nu timur~…ĺ mit…ôpar~…ĺ tu ¶…ô-p…ô a sawa ¶ atu taj-ma-r~…ĺi a k…ônis masasuajaw, i saamisan sa u tukus a buju Ē~ ° u r~…ĺum…ôniaj a buk…ôs a sawa ¶ atupiwma a k…ônis ku tatuduŇč, sawar~…ĺi sa u war~…ĺiju, ńßamin nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° a kitidaan u tukus a buju Ē~ ° nu katimur~…ĺan, i sawar~…ĺi u ¶uŇč-jaŇč-san-maj, satimur~…ĺ nu saamis katanaju Ē~ °**,* kuŇčr~…ĺi, . u kakajdaan nu nanum a sawa ¶ namakajda i saamisan katukuńß i satimur~…ĺan idaw ku piwma a sawa ¶, taj-pin a sawa ¶, r~…ĺi- ¶ija a sawa ¶, ¶…ô-p…ôn a sawa ¶, makakir~…ĺur~…ĺ musir~…ĺsir~…ĺ tajda i war~…ĺiju, ja wajwaj nu sir~…ĺsir~…ĺ mańßida u sapińßpińß a kukus i pusuŇč, u satar~…ĺakawaj a tar~…ĺakaw pitu a bataan idaw ku r~…ĺima a dit…ôk i r~…ĺi-i- a buju Ē~ °, tan…ôŇč mi ¶…ôkaw tu a adińßan ku pusuŇč. u pusuŇč a k…ônis i masatukusaj a pusuŇč, u nikańßida nu masas…ôtur~…ĺaj a piwma a sawa ¶, i kasinawan nu makatimur~…ĺaj a war~…ĺi amis u puu Ē~ ° nu bar~…ĺi mautiińß nu ¶uŇč-jaŇč-san-maj atu tukus nu buju Ē~ ° mapapuud , nika u pusuŇč i tajwan nu sawar~…ĺi satimur~…ĺ a tukusan, u d…ômiat u dińßkuaj a nikasasumad nu bar~…ĺi i baju, kju i kasi…ônawan mańßidatu ku dińßku, sisa u pusuŇč a k…ônis u masa ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsaj a masapuu Ē~ °aj a d…ômiad nu bar~…ĺi. ** nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan kina t…ôbanaj a sasuwbajan a k…ônis sa i nu ajawan nu kinsińßu i ¶uŇč- ¶…ôn a dadan atu ¶uŇč-san a dadan, ja mar~…ĺumanaj a sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj i nu ajawan sa u sin-s…ôna a dadan atu nu idawaj tu a dadan tu taj ** a dadanan ku ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan i tida ¶uŇč-ńßuw a dadan, kju ja mar~…ĺumanaj a sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj nu pusuŇč mat…ôn…ôs pinaaj tu kakija ¶aaj sakapańßi nai Ē~ ° ku pa ¶akajaj a misiwbaj i tus…ô, namańßida sa ¶a u sińßu misakapańß a misaŇča tu aidaŇčan nu pikawawan atu dadan nu kisija a pidaŇčan, **** a mińß ¶a ja pikawawan a idaŇča sa misumad a ¶a tu par~…ĺu basu u mitupinan a pikawawan atu i naajawaj a pabasuan tu kaka ¶awan i pusuŇč mar~…ĺu nu piadińßan tu ka ¶udu , kju mar~…ĺa tur~…ĺuaj a sar~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ tu sakasikar~…ĺisiw kan ¶aaj a ¶a ¶aaj kańßamin mar~…ĺawp…ôs. sikaidaw ku nikapur~…ĺuŇča a mitupinan kju sidadan tu sakaudip atu ńßami mapur~…ĺuŇč nikar~…ĺańß…ô ¶ian, misabar~…ĺuńßaj a ¶a tu jadańßaj a misiwbaaj atu u pańßanńßanan nu pidaŇčan atu mańßi ¶ańßi ¶aaj a itida nisiwbaj tu mar~…ĺar~…ĺitinaj a patijan mi ¶umud tu i dadan nu kisija atu sin-s…ôn a dadan, kja sasiwbajan i ¶api nu bar~…ĺuńßaj a sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj nai Ē~ ° ku mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj ¶aaj kakapańß ku siwbaj, u kakabian a pańßanńßanan atu pa ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tu utubaj mar~…ĺu tur~…ĺuaj tu a sasikar~…ĺisiw a kawaw, u kańß…ônur~…ĺan a tuud nu mar~…ĺukaj sa idaw ku b…ôr~…ĺa ¶, ¶ikija, r~…ĺu-s…ôn a bar~…ĺu Ē~ °, iju- ¶aj a bar~…ĺu Ē~ °, suŇčsur~…ĺi, mami, kama ¶ar~…ĺ, usar~…ĺ. suŇčsur~…ĺi, mami, kama ¶ar~…ĺ, usar~…ĺ. u pibutiŇč tu a sar~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ i pusuŇč a k…ônis inatu nu ńßu-kaŇč i kar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńßan nu k…ôr~…ĺańß, jadańß ku babutiŇčan, sika idaw ku ŇčaŇčan nu babiutiŇčan idaw ku u pija Ē~ ° nu baju, nu r~…ĺik…ônaj a kabus, man-pu a butiŇč, manin…ôr~…ĺaj a butiŇč, u r~…ĺita, masakawsuwaaj a butiŇč, u sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj a tat…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶an a butiŇč, masabar~…ĺuaj a sizimi, u ¶i- ¶iw mańßbin. r~…ĺańßud
S.FORM: Taitung kakilimaan Taitung a sakuwan ku Taitung. kumud nu kalesakan, 111.48 km¬≤. (kalesakan nu linpanti 0.47 km¬≤, kalesakan nu pawliwti 1.09 km¬≤), u kasabinawlan, 10,692 ku tademaw. u kasalumaluma' sa, 3,655 ku luma'. ilabu nu kasaniyazu' nu siyang sa, 6,817 ku yingcumin a tademaw. u kasabinawlan , Pakalatu 64%(Pangcah, Puyuma, Paiwan) ku kasabinawlan. u Pangcah atu Puyuma atu Paiwan ku sakalaniyazu'. nikasakuwakuwan a niyazu' Taitung mala 46 a cuwen atu 20 ku niyazu'. kina 20 a niyazu'sa, Apapuro niyazu' , Pasawali niyazu' , Ining niyazu' , Falangaw niyazu' , Asiroay niyazu' , Pusong niyazu' , Alapanay niyazu' , Karoroan niyazu' , Matang niyazu' , Katatipul niyazu' , Kasavakan niyazu' , Puyuma niyazu' , Papulu niyazu' , Kalaluran niyazu' , Fukid niyazu' , Pongodan niyazu' , Sihodingan niyazu' , Kakawasan niyazu' , Siafulungay niyazu' , Pakurung niyazu' . ŤáļśĚĪŚłā pusung se ( :PusungÔľõŚćĎŚćóŤ™ě:PusungÔľõŚłÉŤĺ≤Ť™ě:PusungÔľõŤáļÁĀ£Ť©Ī:T√Ęi-tang-chhńęÔľõŤáļÁĀ£ŚģĘŚģ∂Ť™ěŚõõÁł£ŤÖĒ:toiňá dungňä sii), . ( u misulitay tu sasulitan u pusung se; nu pancah; pusung; nu piwma;pusung; nu punung;pusung; nu layak a kamu;Tai-tang-chhi; nu Taywan a ngayngay sepad ku ngihah; toi dung' sii ), u nu pusung a kenis u satabakiay a mikuwanay nu tu-se, kitidaan i pusungan a kenis nu sawalian miduduc tu bayu i payteban, i sawalian u taypinyang, satimulan micapi tu tay-ma-li kenis, nu satipan atu saamisan micapi tu piwma a kenis. u ahebal nu lala' idaw ku cacay a lasubu idaw ku cacay a bataan nu pin-huwan-kung-li, malu satabakiay ahebal nu lala' u masacacaycacay sanay u sacacay sanay malakuwid ku cac pin-huwan-kung-li nu pikuwan a kenis; u tademaw makaala tu 10,5 a mang, nu ki-lan kalinku pusung a kenis nu tademawan sa u satabakiay nu paycacay a tuse, hamin nu kenis sa idaw ku pankiway a tademaw u enen i tini manin pangangan i tuse . šĺÜśļź: ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ laylay u enal nu pusung yu mahida naayaway u nu yincumin u piuma a binacadan, nu amis a binacadan u kakitidaan a muenen, hanipidang han maluk ku nikaudip hawsa. naw u he-lan atu kahulaman i ayaw atu nu dikudan u nu dumaan a malcacad nu kakitidaan sa pangangan han tu ''piwma'', nataway sa idaw tu ku layak a tademaw malingatu tu nikalalacadan nu misiwbayay. u he-lan a tademaw nanu tawya tu maydih i tini a papikudkud tu kim sisa patayni tu hitay misadabek, atu piwma a binacadan u li-ciya niyadu', tay-an niyadu' namangangayaw tu, aydaay u pusung a kenis ya masa cacayay a lunem a salisinan ilabu nu tatangahan u sin-wan mamin idaw hen ku naayayaw a ukak nu hitay. . i naayaw a miheca u kasu mamadana henay, sini patideng tu piwma a pikawawan, i nadikudan u Taywan ya masatapangay ci Liu-min-cuwan micuduh a misumad, pangangan han tu pusung a kenis nu tuse. i nu ayawan nu lipun sa, sumad han tu ku ngangan'' sadimulan a kenis baluhay a tuse''. nu kahulaman a nipikuwanan sa mipela tu pabeli tu Taywan atu lipun hawsa, pangangan hantu tu ''piwma kenis'', nu pusung a pikawawan i satimulan a kenis. ŚúįÁźÜÁíįŚĘÉ liwliw nu kakitidaan pusung a kenis i sawali nu satimul nu Taywan, u misudikuday tu buyu' misuayaway tu bayu u masatanayuay ku lala' nu wayway a tuse, kakitidaan nu yakuba i cin-wwiy-tu i tung-cin 121,10 tu, pi-uy 22,45 tu. i satipan u cung-yang-san-may nu malalikeluhay buyu' ienal tukus nudadan atu matatepal tu piwma a kenis, satipan nu timul mitepal tu ce-pe a sawac atu tay-ma-li a kenis masasuayaw, i saamisan sa u tukus a buyu' u lumeniay a bukes a sawac atupiwma a kenis ku tatudung, sawali sa u waliyu, hamin nu lala' a kitidaan u tukus a buyu' nu katimulan, i sawali u cung-yang-san-may, satimul nu saamis katanayu'19,8 kungli, . u kakaydaan nu nanum a sawac namakayda i saamisan katukuh i satimulan idaw ku piwma a sawac, tay-pin a sawac, li-ciya a sawac, ce-pen a sawac, makakilul musilsil tayda i waliyu, ya wayway nu silsil mahida u sapihpih a kukus i pusung, u satalakaway a talakaw pitu a bataan idaw ku lima a ditek i li-i- a buyu', taneng micekaw tu a adihan ku pusung. u pusung a kenis i masatukusay a pusung, u nikahida nu masasetulay a piwma a sawac, i kasinawan nu makatimulay a wali amis u puu' nu bali mautiih nu cung-yang-san-may atu tukus nu buyu' mapapuud , nika u pusung i Taywan nu sawali satimul a tukusan, u demiat u dihkuay a nikasasumad nu bali i bayu, kyu i kasienawan mahidatu ku dihku, sisa u pusung a kenis u masacaledesay a masapuu'ay a demiad nu bali. ÁĒĘś•≠ nilaculan kina tebanay a sasuwbayan a kenis sa i nu ayawan nu kinsihu i cung-cen a dadan atu cung-san a dadan, ya malumanay a silamalay i nu ayawan sa u sin-sena a dadan atu nu idaway tu a dadan tu tay 11 a dadanan ku caculilan i tida cung-huw a dadan, kyu ya malumanay a silamalay nu pusung matenes pinaay tu kakiya caay sakapahi nai' ku pacakayay a misiwbay i tuse, namahida saca u sihu misakapah a misanga tu aidangan nu pikawawan atu dadan nu kisiya a pidangan, 2015 a mihca ya pikawawan a idanga sa misumad aca tu palu basu u mitupinan a pikawawan atu i naayaway a pabasuan tu kakacawan i pusung malu nu piadihan tu kacudu , kyu mala tuluay a salacul tu sakasikalisiw kancaay aca caay kahamin malawpes. sikaidaw ku nikapulunga a mitupinan kyu sidadan tu sakaudip atu hami mapulung nikalahecian, misabaluhay aca tu yadahay a misiwbaay atu u pahanhanan nu pidangan atu mahicahicaay a itida nisiwbay tu malalitinay a patiyan micumud tu i dadan nu kisiya atu sin-sen a dadan, kya sasiwbayan i capi nu baluhay a silamalay nai' ku muculilay caay kakapah ku siwbay, u kakabian a pahanhanan atu pacaliway tu utubay malu tuluay tu a sasikalisiw a kawaw, u kahenulan a tuud nu malukay sa idaw ku belac, cikiya, lu-sen a balu', iyu-cay a balu', sungsuli, mami, kamacal, usal. sungsuli, mami, kamacal, usal. u pibuting tu a salacul i pusung a kenis inatu nu hu-kang i kalalikeluhan nu kelah, yadah ku babutingan, sika idaw ku ngangan nu babiutingan idaw ku u piya' nu bayu, nu likenay a kabus, man-pu a buting, maninelay a buting, u lita, masakawsuwaay a buting, u salengacay a tatelecan a buting, masabaluay a sizimi, u ci-ciw mahbin. lahud
